content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * from sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s on t.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE t.name='FactOrders' AND s.name='gold_schema')
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_schema.FactOrders
    WITH
    (
        LOCATION = 'FactOrders',
        DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
    )
    AS
    Select 
    O.DimOrdersKey,
    C.DimCustomerKey,
    P.DimProductKey,
    G.DimGeographyKey,
    F.Quantity,
    F.UnitPrice,
    F.TotalAmount
    FROM
    silver_schema.silverTable F
    LEFT JOIN gold_schema.DimOrders O on F.OrderID = O.OrderID 
    LEFT JOIN gold_schema.DimCustomer C on  F.CustomerID = C.CustomerID
    LEFT JOIN gold_schema.DimProduct P on F.ProductID = P.ProductID
    LEFT JOIN gold_schema.DimGeography G on F.RegionID = G.RegionID AND F.Country = G.Country
